source.name: Level 6: 1.3 Test Your Knowledge - clean demo phrasing
source.instructions: **You want a clean Inspector demo of the `ask_banking_assistant` flow (sub-agent + MCP). Which user message is the best default choice?**

answers.answer: `Check balance for 88889999` only (no mention of the banking assistant)
One message that names the banking assistant (or sub-agent) and includes the concrete request, e.g. balance check for a specific account
Send `Hi` ten times, then ask for a balance
Ask only `transfer money` with no account numbers

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT choose demo prompts that avoid main-flow competition
source.guidance: Short balance-only turns may start the main `check_balance` flow. A one-shot line that names the specialist reduces routing conflicts.
